objective: Naming consolidation (gateway/broker/compute/registry) + compute binary. Joins mesh as passive peer: discovers gateway+broker via mdns, receives pings, replies with pong.
in_scope: Final node naming: gateway / broker / compute / registry (dropped data- prefix, dropped -gateway suffix)
gateway/: renamed from data-gateway/; name=rafka-gateway, bin=rafka-gateway, init_telemetry("gateway"), NODE_TYPE="gateway"
compute/: clone of broker; name=rafka-compute, bin=rafka-compute, init_telemetry("compute"), NODE_TYPE="compute"
CLAUDE.md node_type enum updated: gateway / broker / compute / registry
All sprint-config deliverable_urls updated to service=gateway
3-service Jaeger: broker, compute, gateway all visible
out_of_scope: Any compute-specific logic (no jobs, no RSQL, no WASM)
exit_criteria: Jaeger services: broker, compute, gateway (no data-gateway, no compute-gateway) DONE
compute emits rafka.mesh.peer.connected for both gateway AND broker peer_ids DONE
compute emits rafka.mesh.frame.received (ping from gateway, parented trace) DONE
